name: Update Health
desc: Updates the player's health, food level, and saturation. Sent ~20 times per second during combat.
notes: When health ≤ 0, the client shows the death screen overlay and sends C16PacketClientStatus(PERFORM_RESPAWN) on respawn button click.

implementation.overview: S06PacketUpdateHealth carries the player's life stats: health (float, 0-20), food (int, 0-20), and saturation (float, 0-5). This is THE trigger for AutoRespawn (detect health ≤ 0 and auto-click respawn), AutoPot/Heal (detect health below threshold and auto-potion), and GodMode modules (cancel S06 when health ≤ 0 to prevent death screen by suppressing the packet that tells the client it died). The server sends this ~20 times/sec during PVP.

modules.name: AutoRespawn (Health ≤ 0 Detection)
modules.purpose: Detect when health drops to 0 (death) and automatically send the respawn packet (C16PacketClientStatus PERFORM_RESPAWN). This instantly brings the player back without clicking the respawn button.
modules.how_it_works: When S06PacketUpdateHealth arrives and health ≤ 0.0f, the module sends C16PacketClientStatus(EnumState.PERFORM_RESPAWN) immediately. The death screen never appears or disappears instantly. Some modes also cancel the death sound (S2BPacketChangeGameState with state=3).
modules.vanilla_hook: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleUpdateHealth(S06PacketUpdateHealth) — sets the player's health/food/saturation, triggers death screen if health ≤ 0.
modules.anti_cheat_notes: AutoRespawn is not detectable by anti-cheats — it's a convenience feature. The server expects C16 after death anyway.

modules.name: GodMode (Cancel Death)
modules.purpose: Cancel S06PacketUpdateHealth when health ≤ 0 to prevent the death screen and keep the player alive. The server still thinks the player died but the client ignores it.
modules.how_it_works: The module intercepts S06 in EventReceivePacket. If health ≤ 0.0f, the packet is cancelled and the module sets the player's health to a fixed value (e.g., 20.0f). The client never shows the death overlay so the player can keep playing visually. However, the server has already killed the player server-side — the ghost mode effect occurs where movement C03 packets no longer affect the game world.
modules.vanilla_hook: EventReceivePacket — cancel S06 before handleUpdateHealth runs.
modules.anti_cheat_notes: Ghost mode (cancelling death) is detectable by any anti-cheat that validates the player's alive state. The server has already marked the player as dead — any C03 movement packets from the 'dead' player are ignored or flagged. The player appears dead to others but still sees the world.

implementation.general_hooks:
Client: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleUpdateHealth(S06PacketUpdateHealth) — fires ~20/sec during combat. Sets player health bar, food bar, triggers death GUI.

Server: EntityPlayerMP sends S06 when health/food/saturation changes. This happens every time damage is taken, food is consumed, or regeneration occurs.
implementation.client_variations:
Rise 6.0: AutoRespawn triggers on health ≤ 0 from S06.
Sigma 4.11: AutoRespawn same pattern.
Tenacity 6.0: AutoRespawn with configurable delay.
Gugustus: GodMode cancels S06 on health ≤ 0. AutoPot reads health from S06.
RektSky B5: No specific S06 module.
Aqua 13: EventPacket fires; no specific S06 module.
Jigsaw 0.26: No specific S06 module.
